arts.ttl: Why Pulisic is at his best with Milan, and are Barca doing enough to protect Yamal?
arts.sum: Barcelona must be cautious with Lamine Yamal after injuries to Pedri and Gavi in recent years, while Christian Pulisic is on a hot streak for Milan.

CB: Inigo Martinez - Only three players have played more minutes in La Liga for Barca so far this season than Martinez, who has started all seven games so far. RM: Lamine Yamal - Leading La Liga for assists with five so far, Yamal has been the difference maker in a number of Barca games already this season.

arts.ttl: Ansu Fati ready for La Liga return where it all began in 2019
arts.sum: Ansu Fati is set for his first La Liga appearance at Barcelona for 15 months this weekend. Fati’s injury issues have started to clear after the Spanish international missed the majority of preseason due to a fresh setback.
